spec-tech-arch.evidence: final-reply: Tech Stack section lists 6 technologies with roles

spec-db-schema.evidence: src/types/world.ts: WorldProject, WorldObject, AiMessage interfaces with typed fields; src/stores/world-store.ts: localStorage persistence

spec-safety.evidence: src/app/api/ai/route.ts: 6+ safety directives in system prompt (age targeting, tone guardrails, response length limits, simple language, pre-vetted suggestion chips, max_tokens:100)

spec-impl-plan.evidence: No implementation plan document found in docs/, README, or final reply
